nasb.text: Then a wise woman called from the city, “Hear, hear! Please tell Joab, ‘Come here that I may speak with you.’ ”

esv.text: Then a wise woman called from the city, “Listen! Listen! Tell Joab, ‘Come here, that I may speak to you.’”

cnv.text: 有一個聰明的婦人在城牆上呼叫：“請聽！請聽！請你們對約押說：‘請你走近這裡，我有話對你說。’”

ccb.text: 有一个聪明的妇人从城上喊：“请听我说！请听我说！请约押到这边来，我有话要对他说。”
